title: A Benchbook for Judicial Excellence
sub_topics: Four Ins: integrity, intelligence, independence, industry
constitutional decision-writing standards (correctly, clearly, completely, concisely)
Australian AID / World Bank / ADB / Philja partnership

stances.claim: The Judicial Reform Program aims to enhance 'the four Ins of a great magistrate: integrity, intelligence, independence and industry' — the first explicit formulation of this mnemonic that becomes CJ's signature framework.
stances.rhetorical_move: four-Ins mnemonic introduction (the framework's earliest documented use)

stances.claim: The Benchbook is 'a much-needed tool of the men and women in black robes' that assures them of up-to-date, reliable, and dependable information to back up their decisions — 'it gives them strength and confidence in making their rulings.'

The Constitution requires written decisions in which facts and applicable law are 'correctly, clearly, completely, and concisely' explained — the 4 Cs of decision-writing applied as constitutional mandate.
stances.rhetorical_move: 4-Cs doctrinal restatement (cross-link with Ch 3 Obra Maestra)

events: Benchbook launch (January 20, 2001) — same day as EDSA II GMA oath-taking

signature_phrases: four Ins of a great magistrate: integrity, intelligence, independence and industry
men and women in black robes
the speedy dispensation of quality justice
register_markers: Tagalog code-switch closer (Sana'y huwag kayong magsasawang tumulong...)
Tagalog code-switch (Katarungan at Bayan, Magpakailanman, Maraming salamat po)
decision_framework_signals: applies Four-Ins mnemonic (integrity / intelligence / independence / industry) as judicial-excellence standard
uses 4-Cs (correctly / clearly / completely / concisely) as constitutional-decision-writing rubric
frames Benchbook as institutional-capability infrastructure (judges' tool not just a reference)
cross_references: Footnote 1: CJ Davide extended centenary celebrations to June 11, 2002
notable_anecdotes: Davide christening the Benchbook 'the judicial bible' at the launch
Benchbook launch occurring on the very same day (January 20, 2001) as Davide's EDSA Shrine oath-taking of GMA
